title: Intense Smoky Peruvian Oats Bowl
description: A comforting bowl of porridge oats topped with smoky double-rise bread, finished with a drizzle of maple syrup and a pinch of smoked paprika for a subtle kick.
instructions: Rinse the rolled oats in a fine mesh sieve until the water runs clear.
Bring the water to a boil in a medium saucepan, then add the oats and a pinch of salt.
Reduce heat to low, cover, and simmer for 10 minutes, stirring occasionally.
Meanwhile, toast the double-rise bread slices in a dry skillet until crisp and slightly blackened.
Pour the cooked oats into a lacquerware bowl, then place the toasted bread on top.
Drizzle flaxseed oil over the oats and bread, and sprinkle with smoked paprika and black pepper.
Add a light drizzle of maple syrup for natural sweetness.
Serve hot, enjoying the smoky crunch and comforting warmth.
